name: Trash Battle
short_description: A casual turn-based card game based on the rules of Trash or Garbage. A classic card sequencing game that involves organizing a hand Ace through Ten in sequential order before your opponent can.
detailed_description:
Description


A casual turn-based card game based on the rules of Trash or Garbage. A classic card sequencing game that involves organizing a hand Ace through Ten in sequential order before your opponent can. After you complete a round, you will start the next round with one fewer cards to complete in your sequence. Play continues until you have won ten rounds. The game comes complete with a tutorial to teach you the basics, and introduces a variant 'Trash Battle' mode to the game. This mode adds a bit more strategy and allows you to mess with your opponents cards and not simply just completing your own hand. You can play against a basic AI opponent or in local competitive mode.

Local Multiplayer


Play with a friend in local multiplayer mode. Local multiplayer requires two distinct input devices to play. Currently Keyboard/Mouse for one player, and a controller for the second player.
